dialogueChunks.intro: It's done, {player_name}. {quest_focus_The} {quest_focus_is} mine, and things will be better for it.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The council recognized my claim this morning. {target_npc} conceded after they saw the evidence and the support we'd gathered. The {enemy_type} threat is being addressed, supply lines are open, and decisions are being made instead of debated endlessly.
dialogueChunks.outro: You helped me earn this. Not just take it: earn it. Here's what I promised, and know that you'll always have an ally in power.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I won't pretend the victory was clean. But it's mine.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The opposition crumbled after you dealt with their enforcers. {target_npc} left rather than face the assembly. Some call me ruthless, and maybe they're right. But the defenses are strengthened and the {enemy_type_plural} haven't breached our perimeter since I took charge. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} secure.
dialogueChunks.outro: History remembers results, not methods. Here's your share of the results.

dialogueChunks.intro: I pushed too far, {player_name}. I know that now.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I got what I wanted: {quest_focus_the}, the authority, the control. And it lasted three days before {target_npc} rallied enough support to force a shared council. I'm still at the table, but I'm not the only voice anymore. Part of me is furious. Another part is relieved. Leading alone was exhausting in ways I didn't expect.
dialogueChunks.outro: I learned something about ambition: having it isn't the sin. Letting it consume you is. Take this, and know I'm grateful for your honesty.
